name: Parent Organization
description: One organization controls another through majority ownership or decisive influence
description_fr: Une société contrôle une autre par détention majoritaire ou influence déterminante
characteristics: Includes direct and indirect control relationships

name: Branch Of
description: Establishment that is a branch of a parent organization
description_fr: Établissement succursale d'une société mère sans personnalité morale propre
characteristics: No separate legal personality — same legal entity as parent

name: Agency Of
description: Establishment acting as a commercial or operational agency of another entity
description_fr: Établissement agissant comme agence commerciale ou opérationnelle d'une autre entité
characteristics: May have limited autonomy but acts on behalf of the principal

name: Member Of
description: Organization that is a member of a network federation or group
description_fr: Organisation membre d'un réseau d'une fédération ou d'un groupement
characteristics: Common in cooperatives professional bodies and trade associations

name: Franchise Of
description: Entity operating under a franchise agreement with a franchisor
description_fr: Entité exploitant une enseigne sous contrat de franchise avec un franchiseur
characteristics: Uses brand and systems of the franchisor in exchange for fees

name: Partner Of
description: Organization engaged in a formal partnership or collaboration with another
description_fr: Organisation engagée dans un partenariat formel avec une autre entité
characteristics: Can be strategic commercial or operational

name: Managed By
description: Organization whose management is delegated to or exercised by another entity
description_fr: Organisation dont la gestion est déléguée ou exercée par une autre entité
characteristics: Common in fund management or outsourced governance structures

name: Represents
description: Organization that acts as representative or agent for another
description_fr: Organisation agissant comme représentant ou mandataire d'une autre entité
characteristics: Includes commercial agents distributors and authorized representatives

name: Other
description: Relationship type not covered by other categories
description_fr: Type de relation non couvert par les autres catégories
